title: The Smart Assistant
description: Learn how virtual assistants make decisions when you ask them questions.

steps.content: Aria is a brand new virtual assistant. Her job is to help the family, but sometimes she gets confused by what they need.

steps.question: If you say 'Play some fun music', what does Aria need to do first?
options: Figure out what music is 'fun' for you

steps.content: Exactly! Aria uses clues from your past choices to figure out what you like. She finds the perfect happy song!

steps.instruction: Which voice command would be the easiest for Aria to understand perfectly?
options: 'Play the Happy Birthday song by the Cool Band'

steps.content: Being specific helps AI understand you better. Aria plays the song and everyone dances!
